title: Shrike (disambiguation)
content:
'''Shrike''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Shrike]]s''', a [[species]] of [[bird]]
*The '''[[Shrikes]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] special recon unit
*'''[[Shrikes Peak]]''', a [[Tatooine]] location
*The '''''[[Shrike (sail barge)|Shrike]]''''', a [[sail barge]] belonging to [[Sidon Ithano's pirate crew]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Garris Shrike]]''', former [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and early guardian of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]
*'''[[Larrad Shrike]]''', brother of Garris Shrike
*'''[[Vytor Shrike]]''', a [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] bounty hunter loyal to [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]]

===Military units===
*'''[[Shrike Squadron (Mandalore)|Shrike Squadron]]''', an Imperial squadron on [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]]
*'''[[Shrike Squadron (Saffalore)|Shrike Squadron]]''', a TIE Fighter squadron on [[Saffalore]]
**'''[[Shrike Leader]]'''
**'''[[Shrike Four]]'''

===Starships===
*'''[[Shrike (Alpha-52 starfighter)|''Shrike'']]''', an [[Alpha-52 starfighter]] belonging to [[Talon Karrde]]
*'''[[Shrike (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Shrike'']]''', a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]
*'''[[Shrike (Star Destroyer)|''Shrike'']]''', a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] in the Imperial Navy
*'''[[Shrike (Strike-class)|''Shrike'']]''', a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]]

{{Disambig}}

|de=Shrike (Begriffsklärung)
